dj_text: Traditionnel Musette (Medieval Cover), and now Don't Bring Me Down (Medieval/Bardcore). The Django demands it. Down to the final track after this one.
commercial_text: Hey everyone! It's time to upgrade your soundtracks with our brand-new {product_name}.
hijack_text: {cool_dj_drop} Pirate Beatdown FM from Subspace Sector Z9XQ,
recovery_text: What the— who gave them our frequency?! That's the THIRD kosmos this week!
title: Don't Bring Me Down (Medieval/Bardcore)
